question_text: Which statement correctly describes what happens when a spring is stretched within its elastic limit?

options.label: A
options.text: The spring is permanently deformed and cannot return to its original shape

options.label: B
options.text: The spring returns to its original length when the force is removed

options.label: C
options.text: The spring becomes stiffer and requires less force to extend further

options.label: D
options.text: The spring breaks immediately when any force is applied

explanation: Within the elastic limit, springs behave elastically, meaning they return to their original shape once the force is removed. Beyond this limit, permanent deformation occurs.
